case_title: DANIEL STEWARD VS. MRS. FRESHLEY'S MINI DONUTS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWARD, DANIEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-06-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DANIEL STEWARD, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-01-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-16-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-06-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-06-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)
